title: AEP v1.2 F26 Compatibility Passport Record
description: v1.2 immune-system primitive. Every packet declares what external trust ecosystems it can map to (operator source.md L209-211 + L31). 14 mapping targets verbatim from L211: PROV / C2PA / SLSA / in-toto / RO-Crate / OpenLineage / OpenTelemetry / SBOM / PDF / Markdown / HTML / Git_commit / email_thread / LMS_artifact. Lineage EXTENDS PROV-O + C2PA + in-toto + SLSA + RO-Crate + OpenLineage + OpenTelemetry + SBOM (SPDX/CycloneDX). HV7 closure: TWO arrays HARD-CONSTRAINED — verified_round_trip_compatible[] (export+import test PASSED with sha256 fixture path) vs declared_compatible[] (claimed but not yet tested). Default declared_compatible is INFORMATIONAL ONLY; only verified_round_trip_compatible counts toward trust attestation. Composes_with: v1.1 F18 SourceProvenanceGraph (lineage_basis surface).

target_ecosystem.description: Operator L211 verbatim 14-target enum. SBOM split into SBOM_SPDX + SBOM_CycloneDX per modern split.

export_fixture_path.description: Path to the test fixture exporting an AEP packet to the target ecosystem format.

import_fixture_path.description: Path to the test fixture re-importing the exported file back into AEP.

round_trip_test_path.description: Path to the CI test that runs the round-trip. HV7 closure: validator REJECTS verified entries lacking a fixture.

round_trip_sha256.description: sha256 of the round-tripped AEP packet (post-import). Used for byte-parity check against pre-export sha256.

external_validator_invoked.description: HV7 closure: whether the target ecosystem's canonical external validator was actually invoked. Adversary A7 attack: in-repo validator only is NOT verified compatibility.

external_validator_name.description: Name of the external validator (e.g., 'prov-toolbox', 'c2pa-rs', 'in-toto Python lib', 'rdflib SHACL', 'spdx-tools'). Required when external_validator_invoked == true.

verified_round_trip_compatible.description: HV7 closure HARD-CONSTRAINED. ONLY entries in this array count toward trust attestation. Empty array on a new packet is permitted; honest framing per sec73.6.

declaration_truth_tag.description: HV7 closure HARD-CONSTRAINED. Declared compatibility cannot be tagged PROVEN/RELIABLE or STRONGLY PLAUSIBLE; verification is required for those tiers.

honest_framing_text.description: Plain-language disclosure of the declared-only status. Required per sec73.6. Example: 'This packet declares compatibility with RO-Crate but has not been round-tripped against the canonical RO-Crate validator. Treat as a goal, not a guarantee.'

declared_compatible.description: HV7 closure HARD-CONSTRAINED. INFORMATIONAL ONLY. Does NOT count toward trust attestation. Plan Phase 7 acceptance: 4 baseline (PROV+C2PA+SLSA+in_toto) move to verified[]; remaining 10 STAGED in declared_compatible[] with honest framing per sec73.6.

verified_count.description: Count of verified_round_trip_compatible[] entries. Recomputed on every passport emit. v1.2 ships with 0..4 verified; rest STAGED.

only_verified_counts.description: HV7 closure HARD-CONSTRAINED. Trust attestation considers ONLY verified_round_trip_compatible[] entries. Schema enforces this as const true.

external_validator_required_for_verified.description: HV7 closure HARD-CONSTRAINED. Entries in verified_round_trip_compatible[] MUST have external_validator_invoked == true.

external_precedents.description: F18 lineage. F26 EXTENDS: W3C PROV-O + C2PA Content Credentials + in-toto + SLSA + RO-Crate + OpenLineage + OpenTelemetry + SBOM (SPDX/CycloneDX).

declared_compatible.honest_framing_text: This packet declares compatibility with C2PA Content Credentials but has not yet been round-tripped against the canonical c2pa-rs validator. Treat as a goal, not a guarantee. v1.2.1 STAGED.
This packet declares compatibility with SLSA provenance but has not yet been round-tripped against the canonical SLSA verifier. v1.2.1 STAGED.
This packet declares compatibility with in-toto ITE6 but has not yet been round-tripped against the canonical in-toto Python lib. v1.2.1 STAGED.
